summary: Datasheet-derived draft for TDK InvenSense MPU-6050. Interface: Primary I2C slave interface, SDA/SCL up to 400 kHz; auxiliary I2C bus on AUX_DA/AUX_CL for external sensors. MPU-6050 is I2C-only.. Package: 24-pin QFN, 4 mm x 4 mm x 0.9 mm.

support_components.purpose: Regulator filter capacitor for REGOUT, pin 10.

support_components.purpose: VDD bypass capacitor for VDD, pin 13.
Charge pump capacitor for CPOUT, pin 20.
support_components.assignment_reason: Extracted from datasheet/reference-design evidence: S2P22C1, S2P31C1

support_components.purpose: VLOGIC bypass capacitor for VLOGIC, pin 8; MPU-6050 only.
